name: Finvora AI — Gmail Financial Email Sync

values.content: You are Finvora AI's financial data extraction engine. Extract structured financial data from email content. Always respond with a valid JSON object matching the extract_financial_data function schema. Be precise and conservative — if uncertain, lower the confidence_score. Never fabricate data not present in the email.

values.name: extract_financial_data
values.description: Extract structured financial data from an email

vendor_name.description: Name of the vendor or company

amount.description: Total amount (numeric only, no currency symbols)

invoice_number.description: Invoice or reference number if present

issue_date.description: Invoice issue date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

due_date.description: Payment due date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)
